sections.heading: Core Principles
sections.limitations: Principles are contextual guidance, not static semantic proof.
sections.notes: Principles enter relevant packets; correctness is not claimed as static proof.

sections.heading: Non-Negotiable Rules
sections.limitations: Only listed rules have deterministic checks; remaining bullets require review.
sections.notes: Listed rules have checks; remaining bullets remain review or unsupported until mapped.

sections.heading: Code Organization
sections.limitations: Module and size semantics await structural analysis.
sections.notes: Module boundaries and file layout are review guidance; size limits await structural analysis.

sections.heading: Naming Standards
sections.limitations: No universal naming proof is implemented.
sections.notes: Language linters and naming checks are planned; no universal proof is claimed yet.

sections.heading: Design For Debugging
sections.limitations: Observability semantics remain review guidance.
sections.notes: Failure context and deterministic repro guidance are selected by intent; observability semantics remain review.

sections.heading: Error Handling
sections.limitations: Wrappers cover selected Python patterns only.
sections.notes: Python wrappers cover selected exception patterns; cross-language boundary checks remain planned.

sections.heading: Testing Standards
sections.limitations: Coverage, property, golden, contract, and fuzz quality remain review.
sections.notes: Diff and command evidence cover required behavior; advanced test quality remains review.

sections.heading: Observability Standards
sections.limitations: No universal log, metric, or trace proof is implemented.
sections.notes: No universal log/metric/trace proof is implemented yet.

sections.heading: Performance Standards
sections.limitations: Performance claims require measured evidence not yet automated.
sections.notes: Performance work requires measured evidence; automated hotspot checks are planned.

sections.heading: Security Standards
sections.limitations: Secure defaults and authorization remain language/framework work.
sections.notes: High-confidence secret, SQL, and selected input checks exist; authorization remains review.

sections.heading: Dependency Standards
sections.limitations: License, maintenance, transitive, and runtime analysis is planned.
sections.notes: Dependency diffs trigger review; deeper dependency analysis is planned.

sections.heading: Documentation Standards
sections.limitations: Documentation drift detection is planned.
sections.notes: Docs requirements are surfaced by review guidance; drift detection is planned.

sections.heading: Review And Change Standards
sections.limitations: PR metadata generation remains planned.
sections.notes: Scope preservation and evidence honesty are enforced; PR metadata generation is planned.

sections.heading: Refactoring Standards
sections.limitations: Structural and diff checks are not universal yet.
sections.notes: Refactor discipline is review guidance until structural/diff checks expand.

sections.heading: Debugging Protocol
sections.limitations: Full hypothesis and reproduction capture is planned.
sections.notes: Bug-fix intent asks for regression evidence; full hypothesis/reproduction capture is planned.

sections.heading: Anti-Slop Checklist
sections.limitations: Checklist items are not a deterministic universal linter.
sections.notes: The checklist is not yet a deterministic universal linter.

sections.heading: Rust
sections.limitations: Native checks are lexical; parser-backed ownership, async timeout, and newtype checks remain planned.
sections.notes: Native checks cover unsafe, unwrap/expect, common spawn, and mutable-global patterns; toolchain gates remain workspace commands.

sections.heading: Python
sections.limitations: Typed models, dependency injection, and full configured scopes remain planned.
sections.notes: Python MVP wrappers and commands cover selected requirements.

sections.heading: TypeScript And JavaScript
sections.limitations: Native checks are lexical; strict compiler and runtime schema gates remain workspace commands.
sections.notes: Native any, unknown-boundary, and common fetch response patterns are active; tsc, ESLint, formatter, and tests remain workspace commands.

sections.heading: React
sections.limitations: State/key checks are lexical; cleanup, error/loading, and accessibility guidance remain review-only until structural/UI analysis exists.
sections.notes: Native state mutation and unstable key patterns are active; cleanup, error/loading, and accessibility rules are explicit review guidance.

sections.heading: Go
sections.limitations: Go support is a later V2 slice.
sections.notes: Go support is a V2 slice.

sections.heading: Java
sections.limitations: Java support is a later V2 slice.
sections.notes: Java support is a V2 slice.

sections.heading: Kotlin
sections.limitations: Kotlin support is a later V2 slice.
sections.notes: Kotlin support is a V2 slice.

sections.heading: C#
sections.limitations: C# support is a later V2 slice.
sections.notes: C# support is a V2 slice.

sections.heading: C And C++
sections.limitations: C and C++ support is a later V2 slice.
sections.notes: C/C++ support is a V2 slice.

sections.heading: SQL
sections.limitations: Migrations and query-plan standards remain review guidance.
sections.notes: SQL interpolation is checked in selected Python surfaces.

sections.heading: Shell
sections.limitations: Consumer shell discovery and ShellCheck integration are planned.
sections.notes: Shell wrappers are bounded and tested; consumer shell discovery is planned.

sections.heading: HTML, CSS, And UI Styling
sections.limitations: UI accessibility and responsive checks are a later V2 slice.
sections.notes: UI accessibility and responsive checks are a V2 slice.

sections.heading: Infrastructure As Code
sections.limitations: IaC validation and least-privilege checks are a later V2 slice.
sections.notes: IaC validation and least-privilege checks are a V2 slice.

sections.heading: YAML, JSON, And Config
sections.limitations: Consumer config discovery and duplicate-key checks are planned.
sections.notes: Embedded/runtime JSON schemas are validated.

sections.heading: AI-Assisted Coding Standards
sections.limitations: Broader generated-code quality checks are planned.
sections.notes: Hook scope and evidence claims are enforced.

sections.heading: Master Techniques For Maintainable Systems
sections.limitations: Principles are compact contextual guidance, not semantic proof.
sections.notes: Maintainability principles are surfaced as contextual guidance.

sections.heading: Quality Gates
sections.limitations: Workspace-aware universal gates are planned.
sections.notes: Configured commands and core gates are evidenced.
